title: Lex's Linens Quality 100% Combed Cotton 2 Pack Black Facecloths
features: 2 Flannels per Pack. Hand Packed by Lex's Linens
Made From The Finest Yarns Giving You Towels That Retain Their Softness & Absorbency Wash After Wash
Soft, Absorbent, Durable & Long Lasting Towels. Use of Fabric Conditioners & Softeners Can Reduce Absorbency
A Stylish Selection of Colours Available Designed to Coordinate with any Bathroom
description: These plain dyed towels from Lex's Linens are a perfect addition to any bathroom. A 500gsm quality towel made from the finest cotton, they will be absorbent & long lasting. Available in a variety of popular colourways that will blend or contrast with any bathroom, downstairs loo or cloakroom. Available in 4 sizes, facecloths, hand towels, bath towels and bath sheets. All options sold as a 2 pack. So choose what sizes you require of purchase the whole towel set. A quality towel at a fair price. Washing Instructions: Machine Washable at 40° C. tumble dry on low. Do not use bleach Use of Fabric Conditioners & Softeners Can Reduce Absorbency.
